title: Ogata on Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Ogata on Shinji             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Jun 23, 2011 12:30 pm http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/1998-November/023265.html I just visited Gainax's VA interview page for their latest [mahjong] game... 2. Ogata feels that Shinji is finished wandering from child to adult by the end of EoE. I also inferred that Anno feels differently. It just surprised me that the VA herself had such a whack opinion. ... 4. The VA for Kaji Ryouji says that he got into the series well after the production began and had to record his parts alone after everyone else had finished.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Jun 23, 2011 3:42 pm Between this and Miyamura's infamous anecdote about the origin of "kimochi warui", it seems like Anno was kind of incoherent about his intent when it came to EoE...

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Jun 23, 2011 3:53 pm Azathoth wrote: Between this and Miyamura's infamous anecdote about the origin of "kimochi warui", it seems like Anno was kind of incoherent about his intent when it came to EoE...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jun 23, 2011 4:26 pm Wow, gwern lately you've been literally dissecting the old mailing list's posts! Anyway I've found the page that you were searching, here you go: [url]http://wayback.archive.org/web/*/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/mahjong/ss/chara/*[/url] But only Shinji's interview was translated in English, probably that guy from the mailing list was referring to the Japanese page when talking about Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 23, 2011 5:12 pm I'm assuming you've combed through this section of the wiki already, but this has a lot of useful interviews/articles (Ogata and others): http://wiki.evageeks.org/Resources:Main & http://wiki.evageeks.org/Statements_by_Evangelion_Staff (I noticed your site is mentioned on this page, so I guess you've seen this already. ) Also: http://www.evamonkey.com/writings/

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Jun 23, 2011 7:25 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Wow, gwern lately you've been literally dissecting the old mailing list's posts!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jun 23, 2011 8:02 pm gwern wrote: No, I've been doing this for a year or three now. Unsurprisingly, the early years are the least productive. Mostly it's that I had been doing my daily ML reading but I hadn't been acting on all the emails I bookmarked, and yesterday & today I decided to try to clear out a bunch of them. (I also took a break to read some recent threads and see whether I had anything to say.)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jun 24, 2011 5:33 am If you use Shinji, you're likely to lose, so I recommend against it (laughs).

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jun 24, 2011 5:35 am ^ What was the context?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jun 24, 2011 6:15 am symbv wrote: ^ What was the context?
